name: taskplane
description: A local-first desktop app for tasks, decisions, runs, and briefs.
author: Taskplane contributors

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main/index.js && node scripts/sync-main-assets.mjs && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.build:main: node -e "fs.rmSync('dist-electron', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/sync-main-assets.mjs
scripts.accept:agent-local: npm run accept:agent-runtime && npm run accept:workspace-patch && npm run accept:domain-agent-tools && npm run accept:provider-native-tools && npm run accept:sandbox-coding && npm run accept:sandbox-coding:code-agent-ui
scripts.accept:agent-runtime: vitest run src/shared/agent-runtime-events.test.ts src/shared/agent-executor-lifecycle.test.ts src/shared/agent-executor-lifecycle-diagnostics.test.ts src/shared/types/run-checkpoint-payload.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/agent-executor.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/agent-runtime-event-step-mapper.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/agent-session-event-recorder.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/agent-executor-lifecycle-monitor.test.ts src/main/domain/run/agent-executor-lifecycle-service.test.ts src/main/domain/run/agent-executor-lifecycle-service-factory.test.ts
scripts.accept:workspace-patch: vitest run src/main/domain/decision/decision-service.integration.test.ts -t "approves a workspace patch checkpoint"
scripts.accept:sandbox-coding: vitest run src/shared/agent-sandbox-provider.test.ts src/shared/agent-session-metadata.test.ts src/shared/code-agent-model-context.test.ts src/renderer/lib/agentCapabilities.test.ts src/main/config/app-config-service.test.ts src/main/db/repositories/sandbox-patch-promotion-repository.integration.test.ts src/main/domain/decision/decision-service.test.ts src/main/domain/decision/decision-service.integration.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/temp-workspace-sandbox-provider.test.ts src/main/domain/run/local-container-sandbox-backend.test.ts src/main/domain/run/local-container-sandboxed-coding-producer-runner.test.ts src/main/domain/run/local-container-sandboxed-coding-producer-preview-service.test.ts src/main/domain/run/local-container-sandboxed-coding-producer-execution-service.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-draft-source.test.ts src/main/domain/run/code-agent-staged-file-plan.test.ts src/main/domain/run/code-agent-workspace-context.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/code-agent-model-producer-loop.test.ts src/main/domain/run/code-agent-model-producer-runtime.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/code-agent-run-service.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/code-agent-source-context.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-producer.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-producer.integration.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-producer-persister.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-injected-producer-preview-service.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-injected-producer-preview-service.integration.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-producer-backend.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-producer-backend-preflight-service.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandboxed-coding-staged-patch.test.ts && vitest run src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-promotion-readiness.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-promotion-preflight-service.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-promotion-apply-service.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-request.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-run-plan.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-planning-service.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-persister.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-persister.integration.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-run-adapter.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-run-adapter.integration.test.ts src/main/domain/run/sandbox-patch-review-service-factory.test.ts src/main/domain/run/run-orchestrator.test.ts
scripts.accept:sandbox-coding:code-agent-ui: vitest run src/main/keychain/ai-config-service.test.ts && vitest run src/main/ipc/handlers.test.ts && vitest run src/renderer/lib/agentCapabilities.test.ts src/renderer/App.test.tsx
scripts.accept:alpha-local: npm run verify && npm run diagnostics:canonical-data:optional && npm run accept:agent-local && npm run accept:sandbox-coding:model-producer-preflight && npm run smoke:release:mac && npm run accept:packaged-recovery:mac && npm run accept:product-surfaces:mac && npm run accept:release:mac-preflight
scripts.accept:external-access:gmail-oauth-local: vitest run src/main/domain/external-access/gmail-oauth-control-service.test.ts src/main/domain/external-access/gmail-oauth-service.test.ts src/main/domain/external-access/gmail-oauth-authorization-session.test.ts src/main/domain/external-access/gmail-oauth-loopback-listener.test.ts src/main/domain/external-access/external-access-gmail-oauth-factory.test.ts src/main/domain/external-access/external-access-source-ingestion-service.test.ts src/main/ipc/handlers.test.ts src/main/preload.test.ts && vitest run src/renderer/App.test.tsx -t "routes Gmail|structured External Access|Context split"
scripts.accept:packaged-recovery:mac: npm run smoke:home-recovery:mac && npm run smoke:project-decomposition:mac && npm run smoke:context-refresh:mac && npm run smoke:context-learning:mac && npm run smoke:code-agent-ui:mac && npm run smoke:agent-cli-task:mac && npm run smoke:run-decision-recovery:mac && npm run smoke:settings-config:mac
scripts.accept:product-surfaces:mac: npm run smoke:external-access:mac && npm run smoke:external-access-connected:mac && npm run smoke:external-access-local-inbox:mac && npm run smoke:decisions-center:mac && npm run smoke:task-files:mac
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.smoke:release:mac: npm run dist:mac:dir && npm run smoke:package:mac && npm run smoke:runtime:mac && npm run smoke:timeline-ui:mac
scripts.dist:mac:dir: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac dir && npm run rebuild:node
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac && npm run rebuild:node
